props.name: ratio
props.type: square | video | portrait | wide | readonly [width, height]

compositionPolicy.validation: Custom tuple members must be finite and above zero; invalid values throw before rendering.
compositionPolicy.semantics: The wrapper adds no role and does not replace alt text, captions, labels, or iframe titles required by its content.
compositionPolicy.overflow: Content is never clipped by the component; intrinsic content may increase block size.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: fit=contain or cover sizes direct image, video, canvas, and SVG children to the validated ratio; fit=none removes the fitting selector and background signal.
